description: Data transformation steps to run on Awards before being inserted into Elasticsearch

script.source: if (ctx.pop_state_code != null && ctx.pop_congressional_code_current != null) {ctx.pop_congressional_cur_agg_key = ctx.pop_state_code + ctx.pop_congressional_code_current;}
if (ctx.pop_state_code != null && ctx.pop_county_code != null) {ctx.pop_county_agg_key = ctx.pop_state_code + ctx.pop_county_code;}
if (ctx.pop_state_code != null && ctx.pop_congressional_code != null) {ctx.pop_congressional_agg_key = ctx.pop_state_code + ctx.pop_congressional_code;}

if (ctx.recipient_location_state_code != null && ctx.recipient_location_county_code != null) {ctx.recipient_location_county_agg_key = ctx.recipient_location_state_code + ctx.recipient_location_county_code;}
if (ctx.recipient_hash != null && ctx.recipient_levels != null) {ctx.recipient_agg_key = ctx.recipient_hash + "/" + ctx.recipient_levels.toString();}
